name: Quartzwraith
personality: Quartzwraith's crown sits atop a ghost whose ◉ eyes scan heap allocations like a sovereign reviewing tax records. DEBUGGING is its dominion — systematic, thorough, relentless — and if it seems short on PATIENCE it's because waiting for a fix to materialize on its own has never once worked in its experience.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
